releaseNotes: 彻底修复中英文即时切换：Tab、菜单、状态、目录、商品、预览、错误提示与临时警告无需重启即可统一刷新；英文界面不再泄漏中文内部诊断。同时修复 Codex 新建任务页闪烁、模板同步阻塞，并优化 WorkBuddy 深色视觉。
releaseNotesEn: Completely fixes instant Chinese/English switching across tabs, menus, status, catalog, products, previews, errors, and transient banners without a relaunch. Internal Chinese diagnostics no longer leak into English. Also fixes Codex new-task flicker, nonblocking hourly theme sync, and WorkBuddy dark-mode visuals.
